moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships begin today, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Opening Day Excitement
angles.copy: Game on! Wimbledon 2026 is officially underway today. Who are you backing for the men's and ladies' singles titles this year?

angles.name: Local Buzz (Devon)
angles.copy: It's a big day for tennis fans as Wimbledon starts! Are you glued to the TV or hoping for a local hero to make it big? Let us know, Devon!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Action
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, hosted across Canada, Mexico, and the United States, is currently in full swing with group stage and early knockout matches captivating fans worldwide.

angles.name: Tournament Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup continues to deliver! Who's been the standout team or player for you so far? Let the debate begin!

angles.name: UK Teams Performance
angles.copy: With the World Cup heating up, how are our home nations faring? Are you still hopeful for a deep run from England, Scotland, or Wales?

moments.title: New Official Singles Chart Topper
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean have claimed the coveted #1 spot on the Official UK Singles Chart this week with their track 'Rein Me In'.

angles.name: New Number One
angles.copy: We have a new UK Official Singles Chart Number 1! Huge congrats to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean with 'Rein Me In'. Is it on your playlist?

angles.name: Chart Reaction
angles.copy: Did the new #1 surprise you? 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean takes the top spot! What else are you loving in the charts right now?

moments.title: UK Heatwave & Thunderstorm Risk
moments.blurb: A significant heatwave is affecting parts of England and Wales with temperatures in the mid-30s, expected to transition to more changeable conditions with potential thunderstorms by the weekend.

angles.name: Beat the Heat
angles.copy: It's a scorcher out there for many, with temperatures soaring! Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool. Are you enjoying the heat or ready for it to break?

angles.name: Storms Incoming?
angles.copy: After the intense heat, the forecast suggests thunderstorms could be on the way for some areas. Stay safe and weather aware!

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Start
moments.blurb: Northern Ireland schools are now on summer holidays, with schools in England and Wales set to break up around July 20-22.

angles.name: Freedom for Kids
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here for some! If your kids are off, what are your plans for keeping them entertained? Or are you counting down the days until yours start?

angles.name: Wales School Break
angles.copy: The countdown is on for summer holidays in Wales! Are you ready for the school break, or are you dreading the juggling act? Tell us your plans!

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Wrap-Up
moments.blurb: TRNSMT Festival, Scotland's major music event, recently wrapped up in Glasgow Green (June 19-21), featuring headliners Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Highlights
angles.copy: Still buzzing from TRNSMT? What was your highlight from Glasgow Green last weekend? So many incredible sets!

angles.name: Best Set Debate
angles.copy: Who had the best set at TRNSMT 2026? Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, Lewis Capaldi, or someone else? Let us know!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for The Pussycat Dolls, turns 48 today.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll's Day
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track or solo hit from her?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ian Paice
moments.blurb: Deep Purple's legendary drummer and co-founder, Ian Paice, celebrates his 78th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Sending huge birthday wishes to Deep Purple's iconic drummer, Ian Paice, who turns 78 today! What's your go-to Deep Purple anthem?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Colin Hay
moments.blurb: Colin Hay, the Scottish-Australian frontman of Men at Work, celebrates his 73rd birthday today.

angles.name: Men At Work Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the brilliant Colin Hay of Men at Work! Which of their classic hits always gets you singing along?

moments.title: Happy Birthday 50 Cent
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) turns 51 on July 6.

angles.name: Hip Hop Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate 50 Cent's 51st birthday on July 6! What's your favourite track from the hip hop legend?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7.

angles.name: Beatles Drummer Birthday
angles.copy: Peace and love! Ringo Starr turns 86 on July 7. What's your favourite Beatles song featuring his iconic drumming?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jack White
moments.blurb: The innovative musician and frontman of The White Stripes, Jack White, will celebrate his 51st birthday on July 9.

angles.name: White Stripes Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Jack White's 51st birthday on July 9! What's your favourite White Stripes track, or a gem from his solo work?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and rock icon Courtney Love turns 62 on July 9.

angles.name: Grunge Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 62nd Birthday to the one and only Courtney Love on July 9! What's your favourite Hole song?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Debbie Sledge
moments.blurb: Debbie Sledge, a founding member of the iconic disco group Sister Sledge, celebrates her 72nd birthday on July 9.

angles.name: Sister Sledge Celebration
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to Debbie Sledge on July 9! What's your go-to Sister Sledge anthem that always gets you dancing?
